  • targets — Define probe-design target regions
  • probes — Generate probe candidates

genoprobe
  • genoprobe
  • View page source

genoprobe

genoprobe is a genome- and annotation-driven probe design toolkit for fluorescence in-situ hybridisation (FISH) and related capture-hybridisation assays.

It implements the core logic of the OligoMiner / blockParse pipeline in a modern Python package with a clean command-line interface and a four-stage workflow:

Stage

Command

Purpose

1

targets

Extract target regions from genome(s)

2

probes

Generate and filter probe candidates

3

screen

Screen candidates for off-target binding

4

panels

Assemble final, non-cross-reactive probe panels
